title: shuteria vestita
intro: Shuteria vestita, also known as the Golden Chain Tree, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain a compound called rotenone, a natural insecticide and antioxidant with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Shuteria vestita include reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions, and treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. In traditional herbal preparations, the seeds are often dried and ground into a powder, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other remedies for its medicinal properties.
